update_history.name: Update history
update_history.description: Downloads the complete SolarEdge production history and permanently replaces raw states and statistics for one energy sensor, typically a utility meter.

api_key.name: API key
api_key.description: SolarEdge Monitoring API key. It is used only for this call.

site_id.name: Site ID
site_id.description: Numeric SolarEdge site identifier accessible by the API key.

target_entity.name: Target sensor
target_entity.description: Energy sensor whose raw states and statistics will be replaced.

target_type.name: Target type
target_type.description: Declares what the target is. A utility meter (from any integration) is reconstructed per reset cycle and calibrated afterwards; a plain sensor receives a cumulative lifetime total. The action is blocked if the declaration does not match the loaded entity.

granularity.name: Granularity
granularity.description: Resolution requested from SolarEdge for the replacement history.

confirm_replacement.name: Confirm replacement
confirm_replacement.description: Type REPLACE to confirm permanent deletion of existing history.
